a.xlink:href: __init__(config_path: str, state: SystemState, db: ThinkDatabase, notifier: NotificationService) → None ← calls ActuatorParser.load() ← builds initial mode from config default_mode start() → None ← starts each actuator as its own Process ← starts _act_loop stop() → None ← stops all processes gracefully set_mode(mode: ActMode) → None ← swaps mode at runtime ← called by SystemOrchestrator from website _act_loop() → None ← watches state.danger_level ← if danger_level >= threshold → calls _mode.run() ← if danger_level < threshold for clear_delay_s → deactivates pump + alarm _should_run() → bool ← reads state.sensor_triggered ← returns True if system should be active

div.div:
__init__(config_path: str) → None
load() → List[Actuator]
← reads config.json actuators section
← builds ArmController, PumpActuator, AlarmActuator
← skips disabled actuators
_build_actuator(entry: dict) → Actuator
← factory method, returns correct subclass
_build_arm(entry: dict) → ArmController
← builds DHSegment list
← builds DHSolver
← returns ArmController

a.xlink:href: activate() → None ← starts tracking loop deactivate() → None ← stops tracking loop, returns arm to home position is_healthy() → bool ← checks servo responses aim(target: Tuple[float,float]) → None ← calls _solver.solve(target) ← moves servos to resulting angles lock() → None ← freezes arm on current target during suppression unlock() → None ← resumes tracking after suppression _tracking_loop() → None ← reads state.heat_matrix_hotspot ← if not _locked → calls aim() ← runs continuously while active _move_to(angles: List[float]) → None ← sends angle commands to servos run_process() → None ← starts _tracking_loop in its process

a.xlink:href: __init__(config_path: str, state: SystemState, db: ThinkDatabase, notifier: NotificationService) → None ← calls ActuatorParser.load() ← builds initial mode from config default_mode start() → None ← starts each actuator as its own Process ← starts _act_loop stop() → None ← stops all processes gracefully set_mode(mode: ActMode) → None ← swaps mode at runtime ← called by SystemOrchestrator from website _act_loop() → None ← watches state.danger_level ← if danger_level >= threshold → calls _mode.run() ← if danger_level < threshold for clear_delay_s → deactivates pump + alarm _should_run() → bool ← reads state.sensor_triggered ← returns True if system should be active

← each component manages its own process
← ActEngine reads it on next loop
